hero_subtitle: Your safe space to talk about mental health and psychology. Here you will find support, information and resources for your emotional wellbeing.
hero_quote: Taking care of yourself is the first step to feeling better.
nosotros_text: We are Lothy, your unconditional friend. A space created for young people who want to understand and care for their mental health.
que_es_text: Mental health is emotional, psychological and social wellbeing. It affects how we think, feel and act.
que_es_card_1_text: Caring for your emotions is key to feeling good every day.
que_es_card_2_text: Learn to communicate your needs and care for your relationships.
que_es_card_3_text: Small habits can improve your mood and energy.
que_es_card_4_text: Seeking help is a sign of strength and self-care.
caja_subtitle: Share your thoughts, experiences or advice anonymously. Your voice matters.
caja_note: Messages will be stored locally in your browser.
